researchResults.title: ABB Robotics launches OmniVance autonomous surface finishing cell
researchResults.description:
ABB Robotics said its new OmniVance Collaborative Surface Finishing Cell automates repetitive sanding and polishing tasks

The post ABB Robotics launches OmniVance autonomous surface finishing cell appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Why physical AI is the real manufacturing revolution
researchResults.description:
Physical AI promises to transform manufacturing, but only if robotics developers and integrators avoid hype and address real scaling challenges, writes Fictiv.

The post Why physical AI is the real manufacturing revolution appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’
researchResults.description: The Nvidia CEO seems to feel that claims of AI's job-killing potential have been greatly exaggerated.

researchResults.title: Closing the latency gap: Why physical AI requires edge-first architectures
researchResults.description:
Madhu Gaganam, founder and CEO of Cogniedge.ai, said the industry’s shift toward true cobots demands more than safer cages or slower speeds.

The post Closing the latency gap: Why physical AI requires edge-first architectures appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
researchResults.description: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

researchResults.title: Inside Colin Angle’s bid to build companion robots with Familiar Machines & Magic
researchResults.description:
Familiar Machines & Magic, Colin Angle's new robot startup, is developing a quadruped 'familiar' to succeed in a challenging category.

The post Inside Colin Angle’s bid to build companion robots with Familiar Machines & Magic appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Ouster releases REV8 OS sensor family with native-color lidar
researchResults.description:
Ouster says its Rev8 OS sensors are the first to have native color and include the OS1 Max with double the range and resolution of Rev7.

The post Ouster releases REV8 OS sensor family with native-color lidar appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
researchResults.description: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

researchResults.title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
researchResults.description: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.

researchResults.title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
researchResults.description: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.
